{
  Item1:
//! This file is auto-generated. Do not edit manually.
//! Structure: Range
#![allow(non_camel_case_types)]
#![allow(unused_parens)]
#![allow(missing_docs)]
#![allow(unused_imports)]
#![allow(unused_variables)]
#![allow(unused_unsafe)]
use std::ptr;


pub struct MyData;
impl MyData {

    const RANGE_STARTS: [u8; 4] = [
        42, 62, 80, 100
    ];

    const RANGE_ENDS: [u8; 4] = [
        42, 62, 80, 100
    ];
    #[must_use]
    pub fn contains(key: u8) -> bool {

        for i in 0..4 {
            if key >= Self::RANGE_STARTS[i] && key <= Self::RANGE_ENDS[i] {
                return true;
            }
        }

        false
    }

    pub const ITEM_COUNT: usize = 4;
    pub const MIN_KEY: u8 = 42;
    pub const MAX_KEY: u8 = 100;
}
,
  Item2: 
}
